allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add arq-CODE architecture design document

Approved design for a Claude Code clone: TypeScript/Node.js CLI
with Cursor internal API adapter, tool system, permissions,
MCP support, and skills/plugins.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add arq-CODE implementation plan \(27 tasks, 8 phases\)

TDD-driven plan with exact file paths, code, and test commands.
Covers: scaffold, config, API adapters, tools, permissions,
session management, MCP, skills, and UI polish.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Update plan: add architectural decisions, fix loose references

Add 12 key architectural decisions from design review.
Make Tasks 9, 11, 13 self-contained \(remove "see design doc" refs\).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat: initialize arq-CODE project scaffold

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Rename to ArqZero, update all references

- Package name: arqzero, bin command: arqzero
- Config dir: ~/.arqzero/
- Update design and implementation docs
- Remove external attribution from docs
EOF
\)")
